channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Secret Service fatally shoots armed suspect following gunfire incident near White House checkpoint
item.description: A man was fatally shot by U.S. Secret Service agents on Saturday after he opened fire with a handgun near a security checkpoint close to the White House in Washington, D.C. According to an official st...

item.title: Defense Secretary Teodoro calls for stronger oversight of UP student activities amid security concerns

item.title: FIFA approves Iran’s relocation of World Cup base camp from USA to Mexico over security concerns
item.description: FIFA don approve say Iran fit shift im 2026 World Cup training base from United States go Mexico because of security worries linked to rising tensions for Middle East. The decision come as the tournam...

item.title: Africa at 63: The case for continental unity in a shifting global order
item.description: The article reflects on Africa Day at 63, stressing that the continent is standing at a crucial turning point shaped by fast-changing global dynamics. It highlights how geopolitical tensions, especial...

item.description: Gauteng residents have been urged to take extra precautions when accessing and storing water ahead of planned maintenance work by Rand Water, which is expected to disrupt supply across several parts o...

item.title: Trump Signals Continued U.S. Pressure on Iran as Nuclear Deal Negotiations Progress Amid Regional Tensions

item.title: Benguet farmers report losses amid low vegetable prices and raise concerns over proposed carrot imports
item.description: Farmers in Benguet, known as the country’s major upland vegetable-producing region, are facing significant financial difficulties due to persistently low farmgate prices and rising production and tran...

item.title: House Speaker Mike Johnson accused of blocking war powers vote related to U.S. policy on Iran
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson has been accused of abruptly removing a war powers resolution from the House floor after it appeared to have enough bipartisan support to pass. According to Representative G...
